name: Luck of the Irish Truffles
recipeIngredient: Hershey's cookies 'n' mint chocolate bar (7 oz, broken into pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place wax paper on a tray.
2. In a small saucepan, stir together whipping cream, sugar, and butter. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture just begins to boil. Remove from heat; immediately add chocolate bar pieces and vanilla. Stir until the chocolate is melted and the mixture is well blended.
3. Pour into a glass 9-inch pie plate. Cover; refrigerate several hours or overnight to ripen and harden.
4. With a spoon, form into 3/4-inch balls, working quickly to prevent melting. Roll each ball in sprinkles. Place on the prepared tray.
5. Cover; refrigerate 2 hours or until firm. Store, covered, in the refrigerator. Approximately 3-1/2 dozen candies.
